columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with synchronous metastases in the treatment arm (ADT plus D) are reported in Table 1, page 3, under "Metastases at diagnosis, n (%)". The value is 128 (67%).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with synchronous metastases in the control arm (ADT) are reported in Table 1, page 3, under "Metastases at diagnosis, n (%)". The value is 144 (76%).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with metachronous metastases in the treatment arm (ADT plus D) are reported in Table 1, page 3, under "Metastases after treatment for local disease, n (%)". The value is 62 (33%).

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with metachronous metastases in the control arm (ADT) are reported in Table 1, page 3, under "Metastases after treatment for local disease, n (%)". The value is 46 (24%).
